name: Cleave
description: As a standard action, you can make a single melee attack, and if you hit, you can attempt a second melee attack (using the same bonus) against a foe that is adjacent to the first and also within your reach.
author: Paizo Staff

name: Coordinated Shot
description: When you and an ally both threaten a target, your ally gains a +1 bonus to attack rolls against that target.
author: Paizo Staff

name: Skill Focus (Perception)
description: Choose a skill. You get a +3 insight bonus to checks with this skill. If you have 10 or more ranks in this skill, this bonus increases to +6.
author: Paizo Staff
